title: MoonPay Lets You Buy Crypto Directly in ChatGPT
summary: MoonPay's new app enables users to purchase Bitcoin, XRP, and other cryptocurrencies through ChatGPT. This integration makes crypto buying as easy as chatting with a bot.
body:
MoonPay has launched a new app that allows users to buy cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, XRP, and Solana directly through ChatGPT. By simply speaking with the chatbot, users can purchase crypto without leaving the conversation.

The integration is powered by MoonPay's existing API, which now supports voice commands and natural language processing. This means users can say something like 'Buy $50 worth of Bitcoin' and the transaction will be processed seamlessly. The app also supports multiple payment methods, including credit cards and bank transfers.

This development makes crypto purchasing more accessible to everyday users. It eliminates the need to navigate complex exchange interfaces, making the process as simple as sending a text message. For those new to crypto, this could be a game-changer, as it lowers the barrier to entry significantly.

For those interested in trying this feature, the MoonPay app is now available for download. Users will need to link their MoonPay account to their ChatGPT profile to enable crypto purchases. Keep an eye out for potential updates and additional features that MoonPay may introduce in the future.
twitterThread: You can now buy Bitcoin, XRP, and more directly in ChatGPT thanks to MoonPay's new app. Just chat and purchase!
MoonPay's integration lets you buy crypto by simply speaking with ChatGPT. Supports Bitcoin, XRP, Solana, and more.
Try it out by downloading the MoonPay app and linking it to your ChatGPT profile. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-25-moonpay-lets-you-buy-crypto-directly-in-chatgpt
standaloneTweet: MoonPay's new app lets you buy Bitcoin, XRP, and other cryptos directly in ChatGPT. Just chat and purchase! No complex exchanges needed.
